plot_contract.durable_isolation_figure_contract: future stabilization-task isolation figures compare the same paired training rows with one 3x3 response-variable-by-level grid per perturbation family unless a later tracked spec explicitly supersedes it
plot_contract.grid: three response-variable rows by three physical-level columns
plot_contract.orthogonal_trace: lower-emphasis signed projection onto the +90-degree right-handed orthogonal direction
plot_contract.trace_source: directly from per_probe_detail aligned/orthogonal command, position, and velocity window profiles
plot_contract.trajectory_policy: command, hand-position, and hand-velocity traces are direct perturbation residual profiles relative to the unperturbed stabilization rollout; no separate trajectory-vs-residual figure split is used
plot_contract.uncertainty_band: SEM across the four signed x/y probes in each family
